fields.description: Automatically move idle (inactive) drivers to the Idle status.
fields.label: Auto-Mark Idle Drivers

fields.description: Minutes of inactivity before an Available driver is marked Idle.
fields.label: Idle Timeout (minutes)

fields.description: Logging in on a new handset deactivates the driver's other devices.
fields.label: Enforce Single Device per Driver

fields.description: When enabled, a CH Transfer Manifest cannot be submitted (Draft → Packed) until at least one carton has been recorded on the Packages tab. Box Count is then auto-derived from the number of packing-slip rows.
fields.label: Require Packing Slip Before Dispatch

fields.description: Require a matching manifest/order QR scan before pickup can complete.
fields.label: Enforce Pickup QR Scan

fields.description: Require a matching manifest/order QR scan before delivery can complete.
fields.label: Enforce Delivery QR Scan

fields.description: Require OTP verification before a delivery can complete.
fields.label: Enforce Delivery OTP
Enforce Pickup/Delivery Geofence
fields.description: Block pickup/delivery when the driver's GPS is farther than the radius from the source/destination warehouse.
Web Push works on the desk delivery app today; FCM targets the native driver app.
fields.label: Push Provider

fields.description: Email a daily logistics summary (deliveries, overdue, rejections, fleet status) to managers each morning.
fields.label: Send Daily Logistics Digest

fields.description: Comma-separated emails, in addition to Delivery Manager / Stock Manager role holders.
fields.label: Extra Digest Recipients
